basic_details.job_title: AIIMS Delhi Senior Project Associate Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: All India Institute of Medical Sciences Delhi (AIIMS Delhi)
basic_details.short_information: All India Institute of Medical Sciences Delhi (AIIMS Delhi) Senior Project Associate Notification 2026 has been released on 10 July 2026 on the official website aiims.edu. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the AIIMS Delhi Senior Project Associate Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 50 years. Age relaxation details are not specified in the provided data.

qualification.education_qualification: Four years Bachelor's Degree in Natural or Agricultural Sciences / Master's Degree in Natural or Agricultural Sciences / BVSc / BPharm or bachelor's degree in Engineering or Technology or Medicine, Master's Degree in Engineering or Technology, Doctoral Degree in Science / Engineering / Technology / Pharma / MD / Master of Surgery
qualification.details: Senior Project Associate: Four years Bachelor's Degree in Natural or Agricultural Sciences / Master's Degree in Natural or Agricultural Sciences / BVSc / BPharm or bachelor's degree in Engineering or Technology or Medicine from a recognized University or equivalent and Four years' experience in R&D in industrial and academic institutions or S&T organizations and scientific activities and services OR Master's Degree in Engineering or Technology from a recognized university or equivalent and Two years' experience in R&D in industrial and academic institutions or S&T organizations and scientific activities and services OR Doctoral Degree in Science / Engineering / Technology / Pharma / MD / Master of Surgery from a recognized University or equivalent.

how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 25-07-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of AIIMS Delhi to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the AIIMS Delhi Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. Download AIIMS Delhi Senior Project Associate Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: AIIMS Delhi Senior Project Associate Vacancy Details 2026
AIIMS Delhi Senior Project Associate Eligibility Criteria 2026
content_sections.text: Senior Project Associate: Four years Bachelor's Degree in Natural or Agricultural Sciences / Master's Degree in Natural or Agricultural Sciences / BVSc / BPharm or bachelor's degree in Engineering or Technology or Medicine from a recognized University or equivalent and Four years' experience in R&D in industrial and academic institutions or S&T organizations and scientific activities and services OR Master's Degree in Engineering or Technology from a recognized university or equivalent and Two years' experience in R&D in industrial and academic institutions or S&T organizations and scientific activities and services OR Doctoral Degree in Science / Engineering / Technology / Pharma / MD / Master of Surgery from a recognized University or equivalent.

content_sections.heading: AIIMS Delhi Senior Project Associate Age Limit 2026
content_sections.text: Maximum Age Limit: 50 years. Age relaxation details are not specified in the provided data.

content_sections.heading: AIIMS Delhi Senior Project Associate Salary 2026
AIIMS Delhi Senior Project Associate Recruitment 2026 - Important Dates
AIIMS Delhi Senior Project Associate Selection Process 2026
How to Apply
content_sections.text: Applications must be submitted online on or before 25-07-2026. To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section. Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of AIIMS Delhi to complete the application. Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details. Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format. Pay the application fee online, if applicable. Review all details carefully before submitting the form. Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: AIIMS Delhi Senior Project Associate Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the AIIMS Delhi Senior Project Associate recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to apply online for the Senior Project Associate position at AIIMS Delhi is 25th July 2026. Candidates are advised to submit their applications well before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for the Senior Project Associate post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy for the Senior Project Associate position announced by AIIMS Delhi in this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for the Senior Project Associate role?
faq.answer: The educational qualification includes a Bachelor's or Master's degree in Natural or Agricultural Sciences, BVSc, BPharm, or a degree in Engineering, Technology, or Medicine, along with relevant experience, or a Doctoral Degree.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for the Senior Project Associate position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Senior Project Associate post is 50 years. Specific age relaxation details are not provided in the current information.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Senior Project Associate post?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a monthly salary in the range of Rs. 57,000 to Rs. 70,680, which includes a basic salary of Rs. 57,000 plus HRA.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, according to the provided data, there is no application fee for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the Senior Project Associate position?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Senior Project Associate position at AIIMS Delhi will be based on an interview.

faq.question: Q8. What is the mode of application for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process for the AIIMS Delhi Senior Project Associate recruitment is entirely online.

faq.question: Q9. Where is AIIMS Delhi located?
faq.answer: AIIMS Delhi is located in New Delhi, Delhi, with the pincode 110029.

faq.question: Q10. What is the advertisement number for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The advertisement number for this Senior Project Associate recruitment at AIIMS Delhi is ANRF-89.
